description_long: This is a white sneaker with a rounded toe and a prominent shell toe cap, featuring three black stripes on each side, characteristic of Adidas design. The heel area is black with a white trefoil logo, and the tongue displays a gold patch with three black stars. The shoe has a low-cut profile and a thick, flat sole, with a smooth, glossy finish. The interior appears padded and is colored black, providing comfort and support. There are no visible laces, giving it a slip-on appearance. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, synthetic material suitable for urban environments.
description: A white, low-cut sneaker with black stripes, a gold star patch on the tongue, and a black heel with a white trefoil logo, featuring a glossy, slip-on design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded white toe cap and gold patch with three black stars on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the three black stripes and the smooth, uninterrupted side profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black heel section with a prominent white trefoil logo and the open, padded interior.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with three black stripes and a clean, glossy finish.
attribute_logo: White trefoil logo on the black heel; gold patch with three black stars on the tongue.
